name: Multimodal Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o with vision for text + image reasoning, multimodal conversation, and audio transcription analysis

dev.note: ~80K tokens/day including image tokens, multimodal testing

prod.note: ~3M tokens/day, high-res image analysis at scale

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for real-time multimodal processing

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Image analysis, OCR, object detection, spatial analysis — pre-processing before GPT-4o vision

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Multimodal agent runtime — input router, modality detection, orchestration, streaming responses

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Audio input processing — speech-to-text for voice messages, audio file transcription

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Multimodal asset store — uploaded images, audio files, processed outputs, conversation attachments

services.name: Azure Redis Cache
services.purpose: Conversation session state, multimodal context buffer, processed image embeddings cache

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, Vision API credentials, Speech service keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Multimodal processing metrics — per-modality latency, token usage, image/audio processing times

optimization_tips: Use Azure AI Vision for pre-filtering before GPT-4o vision — extract text via OCR and detect objects to reduce image token consumption by 40-60%
Resize images to 512x512 or lower resolution before sending to GPT-4o vision — detail:low mode uses 85 tokens vs 765+ for high-res
Cache image analysis results in Redis by content hash — identical images skip re-processing entirely
Use GPT-4o-mini for text-only turns in multimodal conversations — only invoke GPT-4o vision when the message contains image/audio
Implement audio chunking with Speech STT before sending to GPT-4o — transcribe first, then reason over text to avoid vision token costs
Use Blob Storage lifecycle policies to move processed media to Cool tier after 24 hours — most media is only accessed during the active conversation
